items.text: In the silence, your Terminal suddenly blares to life with Mayo's voice, making you jump.

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: {PlayerName}, that girl, Caselli… Something happened to her, didn't it?

options.text: …Did you have something to do with her disappearance?

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: Told you already. Our Paranormal Fan Club isn't just some dorky hobby group. When something strange happens, we're the first to know.

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: …Hey! Curiosity's great, but why am I suddenly the prime suspect?

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: You're good at guessing. Just lay off guessing next time.

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: Come on, we're basically the paranormal neighborhood watch. You think we could do our job without our own intelligence network?

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: So yeah, I know what's going on with her. And trust me, the Dark Side has secrets way heavier than that.

options.text: You just said its name out loud.
Is it... really safe to mention it like that?

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: The Dark Side isn't a myth. But the myths about it? Plenty. I don't know which story you heard, but one thing's for sure, the Academy oversees our investigation into it.

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: Science or the paranormal, both are just different ways to explain the unknown. If something exists, why shouldn't we talk about it?

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: We're not cowards. To me, the Dark Side and all unexplainable phenomena around it are a gateway into the unknown.

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: Hear it? The wind behind that door—

items.speaker: Mayo
items.text: The Paranormal Fan Club welcomes you, {PlayerName}. Whether you like it or not, you've already made it past the first "layer."
